summary: Reproduced and fixed a substantial scafld bug: ContractDigest included the volatile PlanningLog field (per-event timestamps), so two byte-identical contracts differing only in a planning-log timestamp produced different digests. This caused reviewgate.staleReviewAuthority to falsely flag valid, unchanged reviews as review_stale_after_spec, forcing spurious re-reviews and blocking 'scafld complete'.

observations.note: PlanningLog was included in the ContractDigest struct, making the digest sensitive to volatile projection timestamps.
Removed PlanningLog from the digest struct.

observations.output:
=== RUN   TestContractDigestStableAcrossPlanningLogTimestamp
--- PASS: TestContractDigestStableAcrossPlanningLogTimestamp (0.00s)
=== RUN   TestContractDigestChangesWhenContractChanges
--- PASS: TestContractDigestChangesWhenContractChanges (0.00s)
PASS
ok  github.com/nilstate/scafld/v2/internal/core/spec
observations.note: Runx harness (cli-tool runner) over the fix branch emits a sealed receipt proving reproduction + fix.
